MINI MINUTES: JPT: None; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation s present. Represented by Yaxchilan Washington.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Roy Anderson is present.
Attorney Michael Spalding appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-11-2016 is vacated. (JPT/501)
